items.title: RuView
items.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
items.description_zh: π RuView 将商用 WiFi 信号转化为实时空间智能、生命体征监测和存在检测 - 所有这些都无需视频像素。

items.title: openhuman
items.description: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
items.description_zh: 您的个人人工智能超级智能。私密、简单且极其强大。

items.title: agentmemory
items.description: #1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks
items.description_zh: #1 基于真实世界基准的人工智能编码代理的持久内存

items.title: superpowers
items.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
items.description_zh: 有效的代理技能框架和软件开发方法。

items.title: scientific-agent-skills
items.description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.
items.description_zh: 一组用于研究、科学、工程、分析、金融和写作的现成可用的代理技能。

items.title: Kronos

items.description_zh: Kronos：金融市场语言的基础模型

items.title: supervision
items.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜
items.description_zh: 我们为您编写可重复使用的计算机视觉工具。 💜

items.title: telegraf
items.description: Agent for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics, logs, and other arbitrary data.
items.description_zh: 用于收集、处理、聚合和写入指标、日志和其他任意数据的代理。

items.title: supertonic
items.description: Lightning-Fast, On-Device, Multilingual TTS — running natively via ONNX.
items.description_zh: 快如闪电、设备内多语言 TTS — 通过 ONNX 本地运行。

items.title: scrcpy
items.description: Display and control your Android device
items.description_zh: 显示和控制您的 Android 设备

items.title: video-search-and-summarization
items.description: Suite of reference architectures for building GPU-accelerated vision agents and AI-powered video analytics applications.
items.description_zh: 用于构建 GPU 加速的视觉代理和人工智能驱动的视频分析应用程序的参考架构套件。

items.title: CloakBrowser
items.description: Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.
items.description_zh: Stealth Chromium 通过了所有机器人检测测试。使用源级指纹补丁替换 Playwright。 30/30 测试通过。

items.title: skills
items.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
items.description_zh: 真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的 .claude 目录。

items.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development
items.description_zh: 💫 帮助您开始规范驱动开发的工具包

items.title: gstack
items.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
items.description_zh: 使用 Garry Tan 的精确 Claude Code 设置：23 个固执己见的工具，可充当 CEO、设计师、工程经理、发布经理、文档工程师和 QA
